content.title: Muslims Day Ansar Update!
content.subtitle: Alhamdulillah! we now have 466 ansar!
content.body:
🌿 Alhamdulillah! Muslims Day Ansar Has Reached 466 Members

Today is Jumu'ah—the blessed day when du'as are accepted, a day to invest in your Akhirah.

Just one month ago, we launched the Muslims Day Ansar (Supporter) Program. Alhamdulillah, 466 brothers and sisters have already joined this da'wah mission.

May Allah reward every one of them with the best in this world and the Hereafter. Ameen.

🎯 What is the mission of Muslims Day?

The goal of Muslims Day is not simply to operate an app.

Our vision is to build a platform that helps millions of Muslims grow closer to Allah every single day by encouraging them to read the Qur'an, establish their Salah, learn authentic du'as, and guide their families upon Islam.

In sha Allah, over the next six months, we aim to reach 10 million app installs, enabling even more people to benefit from authentic Islamic knowledge, righteous deeds, and spiritual growth.

🤝 Who are the Muslims Day Ansar?

Sustaining this mission requires consistent financial support.

That is why, from among our millions of users, we are looking for 2,000 Ansar who will contribute BDT 500 every month to support this ongoing Sadaqah Jariyah.

They are not just premium subscribers—they are partners in this da'wah mission.

📊 Our Next Milestone

To complete our caravan of 2,000 Ansar, we still need 1,534 more supporters.

Your support can play a vital role in helping us bring beneficial Islamic knowledge to 10 million Muslims.

Perhaps Allah will make you a means of guiding countless others toward His deen.

💎 What do you receive as an Ansar?

✅ The opportunity to share in the rewards of the good deeds of millions of Muslims.

✅ 7 Muslims Day Premium subscriptions.

✅ 1 Mahfil Premium subscription.

✅ FREE access to exclusive online halaqahs, seminars, and special events.

Above all, the greatest reward is becoming part of a continuous Islamic mission that benefits people every day.

🌙 A Decision This Jumu'ah

For many of us, BDT 500 per month may not seem like a significant amount—perhaps no more than the cost of a meal at a restaurant.

Yet this small contribution could become a Sadaqah Jariyah whose rewards continue even after we leave this world, In sha Allah.

Today, on this blessed day of Jumu'ah, become a Muslims Day Ansar.

In sha Allah, it may become one of the most beautiful investments you ever make for your Hereafter.

footer_button.hint: May allah give Hasanah and barakah for all of Muslims Day Ansar!
footer_button.text: I want to become an Ansar
